title: salix divaricata
intro: Salix divaricata, also known as the prairie willow or dwarf willow, is a small shrub or herbaceous perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salix divaricata include relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Salix divaricata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
